name: Harbin Boshi Automation Co., Ltd.
summary: Harbin Boshi Automation Co., Ltd. engages in the development, production, and sale of automatic weighting, bagging, and palletizing equipment for powdery and granular materials industry in China. It also provides post-processing equipment for synthetic rubber and petrochemical industries; and operating robot equipment for submerged arc furnaces. The company also provides automatic truck-loading equipment and plant logistic solutions; and industrial waste acid regeneration process equipment. In addition, it sells spare parts; and offers equipment maintenance, repair, and overhaul services. The company was formerly known as Harbin BOSHI Automation Equipment Co., Ltd. Harbin Boshi Automation Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Harbin, China.
